text: Remedies for weak or afflicted Sun: recite Aditya Hridaya Stotra or 'Om Suryaya Namaha' 108 times at sunrise. Offer water to the rising Sun (Surya Arghya). Donate wheat, jaggery, or copper on Sundays. Respect father and elders. Gemstone: Ruby (Manik) in gold on ring finger, only after astrological consultation. Fast on Sundays.

Remedies for weak or afflicted Moon: recite 'Om Chandraya Namaha' or Shiva mantras on Mondays. Donate rice, milk, white cloth, or silver on Mondays. Keep water in a silver vessel and drink from it. Respect and serve mother. Gemstone: Pearl (Moti) in silver on little finger. Fast on Mondays. Meditation and moonlight walks calm the mind.

Remedies for afflicted Mars or Manglik dosha: recite Hanuman Chalisa daily, especially Tuesdays. Donate red lentils (masoor dal), red cloth, or copper on Tuesdays. Visit Hanuman temple on Tuesdays. Physical exercise channels Mars energy. Gemstone: Red Coral (Moonga) in gold or copper on ring finger. Kumbh Vivah is a traditional ritual for severe Manglik dosha before marriage.

Remedies for weak or afflicted Mercury: recite 'Om Budhaya Namaha' on Wednesdays. Donate green moong dal, green cloth, or spinach on Wednesdays. Feed green fodder to cows. Maintain truthful speech. Gemstone: Emerald (Panna) in gold on little finger. Care for young children and students. Reading and journaling strengthen Mercury.

Remedies for weak or afflicted Jupiter: recite 'Om Brihaspataye Namaha' or Guru Beej mantra on Thursdays. Donate turmeric, yellow cloth, chana dal, or books on Thursdays. Respect teachers and gurus; seek their blessings. Gemstone: Yellow Sapphire (Pukhraj) in gold on index finger. Fast on Thursdays. Teaching others amplifies Jupiter's grace.

Remedies for weak or afflicted Venus: recite 'Om Shukraya Namaha' on Fridays. Donate white rice, sugar, curd, white cloth, or perfume on Fridays. Respect women and spouse. Maintain cleanliness and artistic pursuits. Gemstone: Diamond or White Sapphire in silver or platinum on middle or ring finger. Fast on Fridays.

Remedies for afflicted Saturn, Sade Sati, or Shani dosha: recite Hanuman Chalisa or 'Om Shanaishcharaya Namaha' on Saturdays. Donate black sesame, mustard oil, iron, black cloth, or footwear on Saturdays. Serve the elderly, laborers, and the poor — Saturn rewards service. Light a mustard oil lamp under a Peepal tree on Saturday evening. Gemstone: Blue Sapphire (Neelam) ONLY after expert testing — it acts fast and can harm if unsuitable. Discipline, punctuality, and honest work are Saturn's true remedies.

Remedies for afflicted Rahu: recite 'Om Rahave Namaha' or Durga mantras on Saturdays. Donate coconut, blue/black cloth, or blankets to the needy. Feed birds, especially crows. Avoid intoxicants and unethical shortcuts — Rahu amplifies them. Gemstone: Hessonite (Gomed) in silver, after consultation. Keeping a disciplined routine and honest conduct pacifies Rahu strongly.

Remedies for afflicted Ketu: recite 'Om Ketave Namaha' or Ganesha mantras — Ganesha governs Ketu. Donate multicolored blankets, sesame, or bananas on Thursdays or Saturdays. Feed dogs, especially stray dogs. Spiritual practices, meditation, and pilgrimage pacify Ketu naturally. Gemstone: Cat's Eye (Lehsunia) in silver, after consultation. Letting go of grudges releases Ketu's knots.

General remedy principles: remedies work by aligning conduct with the planet's significations — service for Saturn, truthfulness for Mercury, respect for elders for Sun and Jupiter. Mantra japa is safest and always beneficial. Gemstones amplify a planet and should only be worn for benefic planets after chart analysis. Charity (daan) on the planet's weekday is universally safe. Remedies are traditional spiritual guidance, not substitutes for medical, legal, or financial advice.
